variables.input:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-24h
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter isNotNull(banner)
| fields banner
| dedup banner

fetch bizevents, from:now()-24h
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter isNotNull(region)
| fields region
| dedup region

fetch bizevents, from:now()-24h
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter isNotNull(department)
| fields department
| dedup department

fetch bizevents, from:now()-24h
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter isNotNull(channel)
| fields channel
| dedup channel

fetch bizevents, from:now()-24h
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter isNotNull(state)
| fields state
| dedup state

1.content:
# Walmart | Operations Dashboard

Real-time KPI monitoring across stores, e-commerce, supply chain, customer experience, and pharmacy.

3.title: 💰 Total Store Revenue
3.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "pos.transaction"
| filter in(banner, $Banner)
| filter in(region, $Region)
| filter in(department, $Department)
| filter in(state, $Store)
| summarize revenue = sum(basket_value_usd)

4.title: 🛒 POS Transactions
4.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "pos.transaction"
| filter in(banner, $Banner)
| filter in(region, $Region)
| filter in(department, $Department)
| filter in(state, $Store)
| summarize transactions = count()

5.title: 🌐 Online Orders
5.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "ecom.order.placed"
| filter in(region, $Region)
| filter in(department, $Department)
| filter in(channel, $Channel)
| filter in(state, $Store)
| summarize orders = count()

6.title: 👥 Total Store Visitors
6.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "store.foot.traffic"
| filter in(banner, $Banner)
| filter in(region, $Region)
| filter in(state, $Store)
| summarize visitors = sum(visitors_count)

7.title: 💵 Revenue by Banner
7.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "pos.transaction"
| filter in(banner, $Banner)
| filter in(region, $Region)
| filter in(department, $Department)
| filter in(state, $Store)
| summarize revenue = sum(basket_value_usd), by:{banner}

8.title: 📈 Transactions Over Time
8.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "pos.transaction" or event.type == "ecom.order.placed"
| filter in(region, $Region)
| filter in(department, $Department)
| filter in(state, $Store)
| makeTimeseries instore = countIf(event.type == "pos.transaction"), online = countIf(event.type == "ecom.order.placed"), bins:30

9.title: 🗺️ Walmart Store & DC Footprint
9.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "pos.transaction"
| filter in(banner, $Banner)
| filter in(region, $Region)
| filter in(department, $Department)
| filter in(state, $Store)
| summarize transactions = count(), revenue = sum(basket_value_usd), by:{city, state, `geo.location.latitude`, `geo.location.longitude`}
| fields `geo.location.latitude`, `geo.location.longitude`, city, state, transactions, revenue

11.title: 🧾 Avg Basket Value
11.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "pos.transaction"
| filter in(banner, $Banner)
| filter in(region, $Region)
| filter in(department, $Department)
| filter in(state, $Store)
| summarize avgBasket = avg(basket_value_usd)

12.title: 🚶 Avg Visitors per Store
12.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "store.foot.traffic"
| filter in(banner, $Banner)
| filter in(region, $Region)
| filter in(state, $Store)
| summarize avgVisitors = avg(visitors_count)

13.title: 🎯 Avg Conversion Rate
13.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "store.foot.traffic"
| filter in(banner, $Banner)
| filter in(region, $Region)
| filter in(state, $Store)
| summarize visitors = sum(visitors_count), transactions = sum(transactions_count)
| fieldsAdd conversion = (toDouble(transactions) / toDouble(visitors)) * 100

14.title: 🚫 Stockout Events
14.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "inventory.stockout"
| filter in(region, $Region)
| filter in(department, $Department)
| filter in(state, $Store)
| summarize stockouts = count()

15.title: 🌎 Transactions by Region
15.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "pos.transaction"
| filter in(banner, $Banner)
| filter in(region, $Region)
| filter in(department, $Department)
| filter in(state, $Store)
| makeTimeseries transactions = count(), by:{region}, bins:20

16.title: 📊 Foot Traffic Over Time
16.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "store.foot.traffic"
| filter in(banner, $Banner)
| filter in(region, $Region)
| filter in(state, $Store)
| makeTimeseries visitors = sum(visitors_count), transactions = sum(transactions_count), bins:30

18.title: 💻 Online Revenue
18.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "ecom.order.placed"
| filter in(region, $Region)
| filter in(department, $Department)
| filter in(channel, $Channel)
| filter in(state, $Store)
| summarize revenue = sum(order_value_usd)

19.title: 🛒 Cart Abandonment Rate
19.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "ecom.cart.abandoned" or event.type == "ecom.checkout.completed"
| filter in(channel, $Channel)
| summarize abandoned = countIf(event.type == "ecom.cart.abandoned"), completed = countIf(event.type == "ecom.checkout.completed")
| fieldsAdd abandonRate = (toDouble(abandoned) / (toDouble(abandoned) + toDouble(completed))) * 100

20.title: 💳 Avg Online Order Value
20.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "ecom.order.placed"
| filter in(region, $Region)
| filter in(department, $Department)
| filter in(channel, $Channel)
| filter in(state, $Store)
| summarize avgOrder = avg(order_value_usd)

21.title: 📱 Mobile Checkout %
21.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "ecom.checkout.completed"
| filter in(channel, $Channel)
| summarize mobile = countIf(device_type == "mobile"), total = count()
| fieldsAdd mobilePct = (toDouble(mobile) / toDouble(total)) * 100

22.title: 📲 Orders by Channel
22.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "ecom.order.placed"
| filter in(region, $Region)
| filter in(department, $Department)
| filter in(channel, $Channel)
| filter in(state, $Store)
| summarize orders = count(), by:{channel}

23.title: 📈 Online Activity Over Time
23.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "ecom.order.placed" or event.type == "ecom.cart.abandoned" or event.type == "ecom.checkout.completed"
| filter in(channel, $Channel)
| makeTimeseries placed = countIf(event.type == "ecom.order.placed"), abandoned = countIf(event.type == "ecom.cart.abandoned"), completed = countIf(event.type == "ecom.checkout.completed"), bins:30

25.title: 📦 Shipments Sent
25.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "fulfillment.shipped"
| filter in(region, $Region)
| summarize shipped = count()

26.title: ✅ On-Time Delivery %
26.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "fulfillment.delivery"
| filter in(region, $Region)
| summarize onTime = countIf(delivery_status == "on_time"), total = count()
| fieldsAdd onTimePct = (toDouble(onTime) / toDouble(total)) * 100

27.title: 🛍️ Pickup Orders Ready
27.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "pickup.order.ready"
| filter in(region, $Region)
| filter in(state, $Store)
| summarize ready = count()

28.title: 🚚 DC Outbound Pallets
28.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "dc.shipment.outbound"
| summarize pallets = sum(pallets_count)

29.title: 📋 Fulfillment Method Mix
29.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "ecom.order.placed"
| filter in(region, $Region)
| filter in(department, $Department)
| filter in(channel, $Channel)
| filter in(state, $Store)
| makeTimeseries orders = count(), by:{fulfillment_method}, bins:20

30.title: 📈 Deliveries Over Time
30.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "fulfillment.delivery"
| filter in(region, $Region)
| makeTimeseries onTime = countIf(delivery_status == "on_time"), delayed = countIf(delivery_status == "delayed"), bins:30

32.title: ⭐ Avg CSAT Score
32.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "customer.review"
| filter in(banner, $Banner)
| filter in(department, $Department)
| filter in(channel, $Channel)
| summarize csat = avg(csat_score)

33.title: 📞 Complaints
33.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "customer.complaint"
| filter in(banner, $Banner)
| summarize complaints = count()

34.title: ↩️ Returns Processed
34.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "return.processed"
| filter in(banner, $Banner)
| filter in(department, $Department)
| summarize returns = count(), value = sum(return_value_usd)

35.title: ✨ Walmart+ Signups
35.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "loyalty.signup"
| filter in(channel, $Channel)
| summarize signups = count()

36.title: 🗂️ Complaints by Category
36.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "customer.complaint"
| filter in(banner, $Banner)
| makeTimeseries count = count(), by:{category}, bins:20

37.title: 📈 Returns & Reviews Over Time
37.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "customer.review" or event.type == "return.processed" or event.type == "customer.complaint"
| filter in(banner, $Banner)
| makeTimeseries reviews = countIf(event.type == "customer.review"), returns = countIf(event.type == "return.processed"), complaints = countIf(event.type == "customer.complaint"), bins:30

39.title: 💊 Prescriptions Filled
39.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "pharmacy.prescription.filled"
| filter in(region, $Region)
| filter in(state, $Store)
| summarize rx = count()

40.title: 🧪 Generic Fill Rate
40.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "pharmacy.prescription.filled"
| filter in(region, $Region)
| filter in(state, $Store)
| summarize generics = countIf(is_generic == true), total = count()
| fieldsAdd genericRate = (toDouble(generics) / toDouble(total)) * 100

41.title: 💉 Vaccinations Given
41.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "pharmacy.vaccination"
| filter in(region, $Region)
| filter in(state, $Store)
| summarize vacc = count()

42.title: ⏱️ Avg Rx Wait Time
42.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "pharmacy.prescription.filled"
| filter in(region, $Region)
| filter in(state, $Store)
| summarize wait = avg(wait_time_minutes)

43.title: 💉 Vaccinations by Type
43.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "pharmacy.vaccination"
| filter in(region, $Region)
| filter in(state, $Store)
| summarize count = count(), by:{vaccine_type}

44.title: 📈 Pharmacy Activity Over Time
44.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "walmart.event.provider"
| filter event.type == "pharmacy.prescription.filled" or event.type == "pharmacy.vaccination"
| filter in(region, $Region)
| filter in(state, $Store)
| makeTimeseries prescriptions = countIf(event.type == "pharmacy.prescription.filled"), vaccinations = countIf(event.type == "pharmacy.vaccination"), bins:30
